text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Walking into the cafeteria one lunchtime, I spot
Mejiro Ardan with several plates of peculiar food
in front of her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hello, Trainer. Take a look at this cuisine—not
something you find every day, is it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: It's an herbal dish that improves digestion.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, the cafeteria has introduced it on a
trial basis, but the flavor is so unique that hardly
anybody orders it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It'd be a great shame to let food go to waste, and
since my palate is accustomed to healthy food, I
decided to order several servings.
choice_data_list: Don't you think this is a little much, though?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Slightly, yes. But I believe the additional nutrients
will prove beneficial.
choice_data_list: You'll overdose on nutrients at this rate.
In that case, eat up and bulk up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It's as I feared... I can't manage all of this. Yet I
can't bear to waste any of it either...
choice_data_list: I'll help you finish the food.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Now, please wait a moment while I calculate the
appropriate portion size in terms of nutrition.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan divides up the food, and I eat what
she's not able to finish herself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I will build up a figure capable of winning
races, so please do look forward to my progress.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan goes on to finish every last bite of
the herbal cuisine, getting a healthy heaping of
nutrition in the process.
